settings.heading: Move Without Pain. Live Without Limits.
settings.subheading: The FlexMove KneeSystem™ delivers instant relief for knee pain, arthritis, and joint strain — clinically designed for everyday movement.

settings.heading: Advanced Joint Support Technology
settings.subheading: Every FlexMove product is engineered with orthopedic principles and premium materials to support your joints naturally and effectively.

settings.title: Instant Pain Relief
settings.description: Feel the difference from your very first wear. Advanced compression technology targets pain at the source for immediate comfort.

settings.title: Medical-Grade Support
settings.description: Clinically designed orthopedic support with anatomical contouring that follows your knee's natural movement.

settings.title: Comfort All Day
settings.description: Thin enough to wear under clothing, breathable enough for active days. Designed for your life, not just recovery.

settings.title: Doctor Recommended
settings.description: Trusted by orthopedic specialists and physical therapists for post-injury recovery, arthritis, and preventive joint care.

settings.title: Precision Fit
settings.description: Available in 5 sizes from S to XXL with separate left/right options, ensuring you get the exact support your knee needs.

settings.title: Durable & Washable
settings.description: Premium materials that maintain their therapeutic properties wash after wash. Built to last as long as your recovery journey.

settings.heading: How It Works
settings.subheading: Getting started with FlexMove is simple. Three easy steps to pain-free movement.

settings.heading: See the Difference
settings.subheading: Not all knee supports are created equal. See why 50,000+ customers chose FlexMove over the alternatives.
